note_text:
Pt seen for wound eval. Diabetic Right plantar measures aprx 3.6 x 2.3cm, depth 0.7cm.
Min drainage serous. Heel wound also eval - L heel 2.2x1.4, 0.3cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Mon.

Wound note - Rightplantar. Meas 3.6x2.3x0.7cm. Light serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 64% gran, 36% slough. Periwound macerated. NPWT canister changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Bergstrom notified.
